creator: sauber@netcom.com
text:
I have just installed freebsd 4.2, and recompiled the kernel like
I normally do. However the kernel doesn't boot - it stops right
after probing the parallel port. I have nailed it down to the
pcm driver. If I leave it out, the kernel boots without problems.

This driver has worked in all previuos freebsd releases I have tried.
